baseline.observed: returned empty scan JSON with warning: Scan stopped at configured limit of 0 prompts.
returned empty repair JSON with warning: Scan stopped at configured limit of 0 prompts.

observed_weaknesses: The CLI accepted --limit 0 for scan and repair.
A zero limit produced successful no-op output that can hide operator mistakes.

selected_candidate.name: CLI positive limit enforcement
selected_candidate.reason: Keep --limit meaningful while preserving --preview-limit 0 for stdout suppression.
selected_candidate.success_metric: scan and repair --limit 0 exit non-zero; scan --limit 1 --preview-limit 0 still exits 0.

safety_controls: The change is limited to promptvault-cli.rs.
--preview-limit and --count keep the existing non-negative parser.
A valid scan with --preview-limit 0 was smoke-tested.
npm run check was rerun after the change.
